song.title: Glory, Glory
song.lyrics: [V1] Glory, glory to the Father! Glory, glory to the Son! Glory, glory to the Spirit! Glory to the Three in One! [c] Let us praise Him! Let us praise Him! Praise our God, the Three in One! Give Him glory; give Him glory! Wondrous things for us our God hath done! [v2] Praise the Father who has purposed! Praise the Son who all has done! Praise the Spirit who transmitteth! Praise the Three who work as one!
